description:
An open-source ebook reader designed for immersive and deep reading experiences.

Readest is a modern, feature-rich ebook reader designed for avid readers offering seamless cross-platform access, powerful tools, and an intuitive interface to elevate your reading experience.
Release Highlight
- Performance: Improved TOC loading for books with very large chapter lists
- TTS: Added support for native Android TTS engines (e.g., MultiTTS)
- TTS: Fixed an issue where the next chapter would not load properly in the background
- Translation: Improved accuracy and clarity of some Arabic translations
- Reading: Added support for code syntax highlighting in books with code snippets
What's Changed
- perf: optimize toc list view for very large toc list, closes #386 by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1370
- tts: add native tts plugin for Android by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1376
- Also transform CSS for azw3 files by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1378
- css: handle inline image height by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1379
- Imporve some Arabic strings in transaltion.json by @ahmed-0011 in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1380
- bump: sync with upstream foliate-js by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1381
- add vscode settings to include inlayhints by @jamessizeland in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1385
- add more aggressive overrides for background and text colour by @jamessizeland in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1384
- feat: support native tts engine on Android by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1387
- fix: TTS now properly loads the next chapter in the background, closes #1382 by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1388
- Add syntax highlighting by @jamessizeland in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1386
- chore: handle client uncaught exceptions and show error message by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1389
- fix: various fixes on text selector in TTS mode and normal image height by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1390
- release: version 0.9.56 by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1391
New Contributors
- @jamessizeland made their first contribution in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1385
Full Changelog: https://github.com/readest/readest/compare/v0.9.55...v0.9.56
